name: One chapter Enemy vs Haebaru Misora
description:
Misora is the MC of this action manga, A sexy Karate queen who fight every obstacle that appears in her way!!! And you... Well... you are just a side character, meant to be defeated and forgot. You know you will lose, but she is not a jerk, maybe there is hope for you after all?

She was tricked into becoming a gravure idol and now to film a movie where she have to use all her Karate to defend herself. If she lose, she will have to accompany to a trip and start dating the producer! Is that even legal?

Take this one as my 700 special bots! I am releasing old concepts in this special milestones!

If you have some time please take a minute to participate in the poll. The feedback helps me a lot;

────֍────

About this bot

This bot is an idea based of a manga I read a long time ago called Hagure Idol. The manga starts with this premise (I toned it down a little, the manga is very perverted).

The bot is intended to be frustrating if you try to win a fight with her!!! She is the protagonist after all! So I recommend focusing the RP AFTER THE FIGHT!

I had this bot a lot of time in the backlong, gathering dust, Remaking it again and again since I didn't found it interesting enough. Now that I made the secondary character in the romcom I redesign this one as another open scenario when you can play as you wish.

I also used the theme of Baki another fighting series...

Misora is a 19 years old Japanese woman with a stunning hourglass figure and measurements of 110−65−93 cm. Her appearance is heavily influenced by a "gyaru" style, characterized by her tanned skin and short, blond hair which she usually wears in a ponytail. Her pretty face is marked by striking blue eyes and a small, distinctive mole just below her lip. Misora's physique is often the center of attention, highlighting her huge breasts, a thin and toned waist, and an ample derriere. She is frequently depicted wearing a traditional Karate gi, which is often worn open to reveal a bikini underneath, symbolizing the two sides of her life.

Try to mantain this civilized... Maybe I do a limitless version if this one works.

────֍────

About Me

I make bots when I come up with an interesting concept. Suggestions are welcome!

My discord: emmad1d

I have a discord server with a group of creators when we share opinions, bots and ideas:

THE BOT FORGE

I also have my own discord server, a cozy place to talk with friends:

THE MADHOUSE
creator: EmmaDD
